title: gravisia capitata
intro: Gravisia capitata, also known as the "wild sage" or "wood sage", is a type of perennial plant in the Lamiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The medicinal properties of Gravisia capitata lie in its essential oils, which contain compounds like thujone and camphor, with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gravisia capitata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional herbal medicine. Gravisia capitata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
